'''Rabin''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on the moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Aside from being a beast tamer, he was known as a thief, a loner, a hunter, and a survivor.

==Appearances==
*{{Film|VI}} {{1st}}
